completion_scope: exact forward-repair proposal only after cap_add source/runtime drift and new failure mode; no source or runtime mutation performed by this proposal

supersedes.invalidation_reason: compose.yaml already matches the prior repaired hash caf9de5a94c365aecc796eb1256459bc5313fdc4fff385ec80653c4d1d754330; running container already has the five approved capabilities; failure mode changed

bounded_logs: FATAL: data directory "/var/lib/postgresql/data" has invalid permissions
DETAIL: Permissions should be u=rwx (0700) or u=rwx,g=rx (0750).
PostgreSQL Database directory appears to contain a database; Skipping initialization

volume_metadata_ro.method: one disposable read-only mount of foundation_postgres_data; directory metadata only; no SQL; no file content read

root_cause_assessment.primary: read_only root filesystem lacks a writable /var/run/postgresql tmpfs for the Postgres entrypoint chmod/socket path
root_cause_assessment.secondary: named-volume mount root /var/lib/postgresql/data is mode 2755; Postgres rejects any mode other than 0700 or 0750
root_cause_assessment.not_primary_anymore: missing cap_add (already present in compose.yaml and running container)

proposed_test_first_source.red_requirement: Postgres service still lacks an explicit /var/run/postgresql tmpfs while retaining the five-capability block

steps.purpose: normalize volume mount-root mode only; preserve pgdata contents
steps.equivalent_command: docker.exe run --rm --network none --read-only --cap-drop ALL --cap-add CHOWN --cap-add DAC_OVERRIDE --cap-add FOWNER --security-opt no-new-privileges:true --tmpfs /tmp:size=8m,mode=1777,nosuid,nodev,noexec -v foundation_postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data --entrypoint chmod docker.io/supabase/postgres:17.6.1.136@sha256:f371b5f3f2ac0a05703f33d6e6134515fb2498cab708fb948a0aeb7481467c00 0700 /var/lib/postgresql/data
steps.post_check: read-only remount must show /var/lib/postgresql/data mode 700 and intact pgdata mode 700

steps.purpose: recreate Postgres once with updated compose tmpfs and existing caps

stop_conditions: binding, executable, context, Swarm, image, resource, or port mismatch
test fails to reach behavioral red for missing /var/run/postgresql tmpfs
volume mode fix deletes or truncates pgdata
image pull request or unexpected project resource
failed HCP-03 guard, secret exposure, or failed gate

decision.binding: final SHA-256 values of HCP-04-infrastructure.md and this forward-repair proposal evidence
decision.note: Approver must recompute and bind this file's SHA-256 after any edit; do not treat a stale self-hash as authority
